title: Mamba & State-Space Models, Visualised
tagline: An RNN that scales linearly with sequence length — and beats attention on long contexts
summary: A discrete-time SSM is a linear recurrence. Watch a one-channel SSM state evolve as it processes a 256-step input; toggle the selective Δ parameter that gives Mamba its key advantage; compare with attention's quadratic cost on the same sequence.
highlights: Live discrete-time SSM forward pass on a 256-step input; state value plotted alongside input.
Selective Δ slider — Mamba's input-dependent step size that turns a static SSM into a content-sensitive one.
Cost-vs-length plot: O(N) Mamba scan vs O(N²) attention.
When SSMs win, when attention wins, where hybrids live.
